app.offlineBanner: You're offline. Cached pages and saved learning content are still available.

app.iosInstallHint: Open Share and tap Add to Home Screen.
app.desktopInstallHint: Use your browser menu and choose Install App.

home.title: Learning that stays strong when the network gets weak.
home.subtitle: EduReach brings structured courses, AI-powered study support, and low-bandwidth delivery together so every learner can keep moving forward.
home.offlineDescription: Text-first lessons, smart summaries, and mobile-ready delivery keep classrooms open anywhere.
home.buildOnceDescription: Upload videos, auto-generate summaries, and host live classes in one workflow.
home.categoriesSubtitle: Curated streams for careers, skills, and community impact.
home.coursesSubtitle: Handpicked courses with structured modules, quizzes, and live sessions.
home.noCourses: No courses yet. Check back soon.
home.partnersSubtitle: Collaboration with rural colleges and community learning centers.
home.footerText: Smart learning for every network. Built for rural education, teacher-led growth, and resilient connectivity.
